Compressor Minimum Runtime step size (X10) for min/max allowable

name: WAC Fan Setting
description: The user's fan setting for WAC products
comment: WAC Fan Setting: Enum writable select.

name: WAC Operation Mode
description: The operation mode for WAC products
comment: WAC Operation Mode: Enum writable select.

name: WAC Ambient Temperature
description: The Ambient temperature for WAC products (Valid Range - min 32(0x20)F max 140(0x8C)F)
comment: WAC Ambient Temperature: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: WAC Filter Notification
description: Notification of whether the filter requires cleaning/replacement
comment: WAC Filter Notification: Binary enum writable switch.

name: Information of consumed power and time period.
description: This ERD will give users how much power is consumed in a period of time. This value can be read by mobile devices.
comment: Information of consumed power and time period.: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: WAC Power On/Off State
description: The power on/off state for WAC products
comment: WAC Power On/Off State: Boolean writable switch.

name: Compressor Error Status
description: The Error Status of the AC Compressor
comment: Compressor Error Status: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Cumulative Energy
description: The cumulative energy usage in Wh
comment: Cumulative Energy: Cumulative energy measurement.

name: WAC Save Energy Info Indicator
description: Indication from WAC to save energy data in cloud
comment: WAC Save Energy Info Indicator: Enum read-only sensor.

name: WAC Save Energy Time
description: The Energy Data Save Time Interval for WAC in minutes
comment: WAC Save Energy Time: Single numeric writable value.

name: Matter Thermostat Cluster Local Temperature
description: The local temperature in units of 0.01 Celsius.
comment: Matter Thermostat Cluster Local Temperature: Temperature in Celsius.

name: Matter Thermostat Cluster Minimum Cooling Setpoint
description: The minimum cooling setpoint in units of 0.01 Celsius.
comment: Matter Thermostat Cluster Minimum Cooling Setpoint: Temperature in Celsius.

name: Matter Thermostat Cluster Maximum Cooling Setpoint
description: The max cooling setpoint in units of 0.01 Celsius.
comment: Matter Thermostat Cluster Maximum Cooling Setpoint: Temperature in Celsius.

name: Matter Thermostat Cluster PI Cooling Demand
description: The level of cooling demanded by the PI (proportional integral) control loop in use by the thermostat, in percent (0-100%).
comment: Matter Thermostat Cluster PI Cooling Demand: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Matter Thermostat Cluster Occupied Cooling Setpoint Request
description: The requested temperature setpoint in units of 0.01 Celsius.
comment: Matter Thermostat Cluster Occupied Cooling Setpoint Request: Temperature in Celsius.

name: Matter Thermostat Cluster Occupied Cooling Setpoint Actual
description: The actual temperature setpoint in units of 0.01 Celsius.
comment: Matter Thermostat Cluster Occupied Cooling Setpoint Actual: Temperature in Celsius.

name: Matter Thermostat Cluster Control Sequence of Operation
description: The supported thermostat/AC control modes and the control sequence of operation.
comment: Matter Thermostat Cluster Control Sequence of Operation: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Matter Thermostat Cluster System Mode Request
description: The request to change the mode of operation. The Matter spec omits the value 2 for some reason.
comment: Matter Thermostat Cluster System Mode Request: Enum writable select.

name: Matter Thermostat Cluster System Mode Actual
description: The actual mode of operation. The Matter spec omits the value 2 for some reason.
comment: Matter Thermostat Cluster System Mode Actual: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Matter Fan Control Cluster Fan Mode Request
description: Request to change the fan mode.
comment: Matter Fan Control Cluster Fan Mode Request: Enum writable select.

name: Matter Fan Control Cluster Fan Mode Actual
description: The actual fan state.
comment: Matter Fan Control Cluster Fan Mode Actual: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Matter Fan Control Cluster Fan Mode Sequence
description: This ERD indicates the supported fan modes and the sequence of mode changes.
comment: Matter Fan Control Cluster Fan Mode Sequence: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Matter Fan Control Cluster Percent Setting Request
description: Request to change the fan speed in percentage (0 - 100%).
comment: Matter Fan Control Cluster Percent Setting Request: Single numeric writable value.

name: Matter Fan Control Cluster Percent Setting Actual
description: The actual target fan speed in percentage (0 - 100%).
comment: Matter Fan Control Cluster Percent Setting Actual: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Matter Fan Control Cluster Percent Current
description: The current fan speed in percentage (0 - 100%).
comment: Matter Fan Control Cluster Percent Current: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Available AC Modes
description: The available modes on an air conditioner
comment: Available AC Modes: Multi-field enum sensor, may need custom handling.

name: Current Humidity
description: The current humidity in the range of 1% (0x01) to 100% (0x64)
comment: Current Humidity: Humidity percentage sensor.

name: Target Humidity
description: The desired humidity in %
comment: Target Humidity: Humidity percentage sensor.

name: Target Humidity Range
description: The valid range (in %) of the target humidity
comment: Target Humidity Range: Humidity percentage sensor.

name: Sleep Mode
description: Sleep mode for split AC
comment: Sleep Mode: Binary enum writable switch.

name: Target Temperature Range
description: The valid range (in F) of the target temperature
comment: Target Temperature Range: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: Up-down Air Swing
description: The vertical (up-down) swing
comment: Up-down Air Swing: Boolean writable switch.

name: Left-right Air Swing
description: The horizontal (left-right) swing
comment: Left-right Air Swing: Boolean writable switch.

name: Air Swing Availability
description: The availability of air swings
comment: Air Swing Availability: Multi-field enum sensor, may need custom handling.

name: Available AC Fan Speeds
description: The available fan speeds on an air conditioner
comment: Available AC Fan Speeds: Speed/RPM sensor.

name: Eco Mode
description: Eco mode for Split AC
comment: Eco Mode: Binary enum writable switch.

name: Sleep Mode Request
description: Request to turn on/off sleep mode.
comment: Sleep Mode Request: Boolean writable switch.

name: Sleep Mode On/Off Status
description: Status of sleep mode.
comment: Sleep Mode On/Off Status: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Water Softener Error State
description: The enumerated error code for the water softener

values.4: Position switch changing after motor is shutoff
values.5: Bad Printed Wire Assembly (corrupted RAM memory)
values.8: Shutoff Valve closed and open switches both low
values.9: UI and Power board communication error

comment: Water Softener Error State: Enum read-only sensor.

comment: Water Softener Estimated Days of Salt Remaining: Single numeric read-only sensor.

description: Average Daily Water Usage in Gallons

comment: Water Softener Average Daily Water Usage: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Water Softener Daily Water Usage

comment: Water Softener Daily Water Usage: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Water Softener Shutoff Valve Installed
description: Flag indicating whether option is installed

description: Enumeration indicating actual state of shutoff valve

name: Coffee Brewer Brewing
description: Whether or not the coffee brewer is currently brewing.
comment: Coffee Brewer Brewing: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Coffee Brewer Brew Temperature
description: Configured brew temperature.
comment: Coffee Brewer Brew Temperature: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: Coffee Brewer Brew Temperature Limits
description: Minimum and maximum brew temperatures.
comment: Coffee Brewer Brew Temperature Limits: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: Coffee Brewer Bloom Pump Run Time
description: Current bloom pump run time.
comment: Coffee Brewer Bloom Pump Run Time: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Coffee Brewer Bloom Dwell Time
description: Current bloom dwell time.
comment: Coffee Brewer Bloom Dwell Time: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Coffee Brewer Brew Duration
description: Amount of time that the coffee brewer has been brewing.
comment: Coffee Brewer Brew Duration: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Coffee Brewer Brew Cups
description: Cups configured to brew.
comment: Coffee Brewer Brew Cups: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Coffee Brewer Brew Cups Limits
description: Minimum and maximum cups that can be brewed.
comment: Coffee Brewer Brew Cups Limits: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Coffee Brewer Brew Strength
description: Configured brew strength. Reads as custom if a custom brew has been started with 0x9010.
comment: Coffee Brewer Brew Strength: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Coffee Brewer Supported Brew Strengths
description: Supported brew strengths.
comment: Coffee Brewer Supported Brew Strengths: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Coffee Brewer Time Since Brew Complete
description: Time since brew last completed.
comment: Coffee Brewer Time Since Brew Complete: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Coffee Brewer Start Brew
description: Start brewing with specified options. Supported options are given in 0x9002, 0x9007, and 0x9009.
comment: Coffee Brewer Start Brew: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Coffee Brewer Cancel Brew
description: Cancel running brew. Write 0x01 to trigger a cancellation.
comment: Coffee Brewer Cancel Brew: Single numeric writable value.

name: Coffee Brewer Brew Duration Limits
description: Minimum and maximum brew duration limits.
comment: Coffee Brewer Brew Duration Limits: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Coffee Brewer Bloom Pump Run Time Limits
description: Minimum and maximum bloom pump run time limits.
comment: Coffee Brewer Bloom Pump Run Time Limits: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Coffee Brewer Bloom Dwell Time Limits
description: Minimum and maximum bloom dwell time limits.
comment: Coffee Brewer Bloom Dwell Time Limits: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Coffee Brewer Start Custom Brew
description: Start a custom brew with the specified options. All fields are required.
comment: Coffee Brewer Start Custom Brew: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Coffee Brewer Filter Remaining Gallons
description: Remaining gallons before the filter is exhausted.
comment: Coffee Brewer Filter Remaining Gallons: Single numeric read-only sensor.
